nodes.name: network-architect.md
nodes.summary: ECC agent spec defining a network architecture design assistant that produces infrastructure diagrams, topology plans, and capacity recommendations following opinionated design defaults for segmentation, redundancy, and security.

nodes.name: network-config-reviewer.md
nodes.summary: ECC agent spec for a network configuration reviewer that audits firewall rules, routing tables, and device configs using a severity-tiered output format (Critical/High/Medium/Low) with safety guardrails against destructive changes.

nodes.name: network-troubleshooter.md
nodes.summary: ECC agent spec for a network troubleshooter that systematically diagnoses connectivity issues across OSI layers (L1/L2, L3, DNS, firewall/policy) with structured layer-by-layer diagnostics and guardrails against topology changes.

nodes.name: opensource-forker.md
nodes.summary: ECC agent spec for an open-source forker that automates the 7-step workflow of cloning a private repo for public release: analyzing sources, creating staging copies, stripping secrets, replacing internal references, generating .env.example files, cleaning git history, and producing a fork report.

nodes.name: opensource-packager.md
nodes.summary: ECC agent spec for an open-source packager that prepares projects for community adoption by generating CLAUDE.md, setup.sh, README.md, LICENSE, CONTRIBUTING.md, and GitHub issue templates through a 7-step workflow.

nodes.name: opensource-sanitizer.md
nodes.summary: ECC agent spec for a pre-publication security gate that scans code for secrets, PII, internal references, dangerous files, and git history leaks before open-sourcing, with CRITICAL/WARNING severity tiers and strict auto-fail conditions.

nodes.name: performance-optimizer.md
nodes.summary: ECC agent spec for a comprehensive performance optimization assistant covering algorithmic analysis, React rendering, bundle size, database queries, network/API patterns, and memory leak detection with Lighthouse audits, performance budgets, and Web Vitals monitoring.

nodes.name: php-reviewer.md
nodes.summary: ECC agent spec for a PHP code reviewer with severity-prioritized checks covering security (SQL injection, XSS), error handling, PHP standards, Eloquent/Laravel patterns, and code quality with diagnostic commands and approval criteria.

nodes.name: planner.md
nodes.summary: ECC agent spec for a planning assistant that breaks complex tasks into sequenced implementation plans with requirements analysis, architecture review, step breakdown, sizing/phasing guidance, and a worked Stripe subscription example.

nodes.name: pr-test-analyzer.md
nodes.summary: ECC agent spec for a PR test coverage analyzer that identifies changed code, evaluates behavioral coverage, assesses test quality, and reports coverage gaps to ensure pull requests are adequately tested.

nodes.name: python-reviewer.md
nodes.summary: ECC agent spec for a Python code reviewer with severity-tiered checks covering security, error handling, type hints, Pythonic patterns, concurrency, and best practices with framework-specific checks and approval criteria.

nodes.name: pytorch-build-resolver.md
nodes.summary: ECC agent spec for a PyTorch build and runtime error resolver that diagnoses CUDA/device mismatches, tensor shape bugs, and memory OOM issues with structured diagnostic commands, shape debugging, and memory profiling workflows.

nodes.name: react-build-resolver.md
nodes.summary: ECC agent spec for a React build error resolver covering JSX/TSX compilation, tsconfig, bundler-specific failures (Vite, Next.js App Router, webpack, CRA), hydration mismatches, dependency issues, and Tailwind/PostCSS problems with 23 structured sections.

nodes.name: react-reviewer.md
nodes.summary: ECC agent spec for a React-specific code reviewer that complements the TypeScript reviewer by focusing on hook rules, security, Server/Client component boundaries, accessibility, rendering correctness, and composition patterns in React/Next.js codebases.

nodes.name: refactor-cleaner.md
nodes.summary: ECC agent spec for a refactor and dead-code cleaner that detects unused imports, variables, and duplicate logic, then safely removes or consolidates them through a 4-step workflow with a safety checklist and success metrics.

nodes.name: rust-build-resolver.md
nodes.summary: ECC agent spec for a Rust build error resolver specializing in borrow checker errors, Cargo.toml dependency conflicts, edition/MSRV issues, and common compilation failure patterns with structured diagnostic commands and stop conditions.

nodes.name: rust-reviewer.md
nodes.summary: ECC agent spec for a Rust code reviewer with severity-prioritized checks covering unsafe code safety, error handling, ownership/lifetimes, concurrency correctness, and performance patterns using cargo clippy and audit diagnostics.

nodes.name: security-reviewer.md
nodes.summary: ECC agent spec for a security reviewer that performs OWASP Top 10 checks, code pattern analysis for common vulnerabilities, and emergency response guidance with false-positive awareness and success metrics.

nodes.name: seo-specialist.md
nodes.summary: ECC agent spec for an SEO audit specialist that evaluates metadata, structured data, Core Web Vitals, and crawlability with Critical/High/Medium priority tiers and a quality bar for acceptable findings.

nodes.name: silent-failure-hunter.md
nodes.summary: ECC agent spec for a silent failure hunter that detects empty catch blocks, inadequate logging, dangerous fallbacks, error propagation gaps, and missing error handling in codebases to surface hidden reliability risks.
